name: sast_hunt_core
description: Reusable source-code hunt: seed focused leads (entry points / dependency CVEs / objective sweeps), fan out one sast_hunt_agent per lead, and collect + dedupe the emitted attack hypotheses. Output is a hypotheses[] list in the standard hypothesis schema (usable for source-only reporting AND as live exploit-loop fuel).

inputParameters.queryExpression: . as $in | ($in.leads // []) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({ name: "sast_hunt_agent", taskReferenceName: ("hunt_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name:"sast_hunt_agent", version:1} }), forkTasksInputs: (map({ key: ("hunt_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { lead: .value, source_path: $in.source_path, max_steps: ($in.max_steps // 10), catalog_objectives: $in.catalog_objectives, cve_leads: $in.cve_leads, identities: $in.identities, oob_available: $in.oob_available } }) | from_entries), count: length }

. as $in | ([ $in.join[]? | select(type=="object") | (.hypotheses // [])[] | select(type=="object") ]) as $all | ($all | unique_by(((.category // "other") + "|" + (.target // "") + "|" + ((.identities // []) | sort | join(","))))) as $ded | (["high","medium","low"]) as $ord | (($ded | sort_by((.self_confidence // "low") as $sc | (($ord | index($sc)) // 3)))[0:8]) as $top | { hypotheses: ($top | to_entries | map(.value + {id: ("H-hunt-" + ((.key+1)|tostring)), source: "hunter"})) }
